  "findings": [
    "Head joints are unfilled with visible voids, violating masonry construction standards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Rake out incomplete head joints and fully tuckpoint them with mortar to ensure complete coverage and structural integrity before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 602 (Specification for Masonry Structures) requires that mortar joints be completely filled. Unfilled head joints compromise the structural integrity, shear strength, and water resistance of the masonry wall.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 602 Article 3.3 B.1.a",
    "TMS 602 Article 3.3 B.1.b"
  ]
}
